name: holographicmenubar
title: Holographic Menubar
description: HolographicMenubar — A desktop-class menubar with holographic glass dropdowns. Each menu opens with a dimensional "fold" animation, items have directional shimmer on hover, and keyboard shortcuts glow with neon accents. The active menu trigger has a pulsing underline beam.
